message: Replaced persistent cache per-key SemaphoreSlim retention with removable ref-counted entry locks; added regression asserting completed unique cache misses leave no retained in-memory entry locks while preserving same-key serialization.

Verified persistent artifact cache entry lock lifecycle: ref-counted locks are retained before waiting, removed only when no waiters/holders remain, and stale removed locks reject new retains until dictionary removal completes. Validation passed: dotnet test tests\SafeIR.Tests\SafeIR.Tests.csproj --filter FullyQualifiedName~CompiledCacheConcurrencyTests (5 passed); .\scripts\check-csharp-file-lines.ps1 (CodeEnforcer passed); .\scripts\agentq.ps1 doctor (doctor ok).
